languages.text: "О, мы перешли на "ты"? Смело". {n}По пухлым губам наследницы расползается язвительная усмешка.{/n} "Я заинтригована. Предположим, ты прав{mf||а}, но что с того? Это лишь твое слово против моего, и вряд ли Себериан прислушается к нему."

"Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."
languages.original_text: "О, мы перешли на "ты"? Смело". {n}По пухлым губам наследницы расползается язвительная усмешка.{/n} "Я заинтригована. Предположим, ты прав{mf||а}, но что с того? Это лишь твое слово против моего, и вряд ли Себериан прислушается к нему."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

"Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

"Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

languages.text: «Oh, ¿ya hemos pasado a los nombres de pila? Muy atrevid{mf|o|a}». {n}Sus labios carnosos se convierten en una sonrisa sardónica.{/n} «Estoy intrigada. Digamos que tiene razón: ¿y qué? Es su palabra contra la mía y dudo que Seberian l{mf|e|a} crea a usted».
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, ¿ya hemos pasado a los nombres de pila? Muy atrevid{mf|o|a}». {n}Sus labios carnosos se convierten en una sonrisa sardónica.{/n} «Estoy intrigada. Digamos que tiene razón: ¿y qué? Es su palabra contra la mía y dudo que Seberian l{mf|e|a} crea a usted».

languages.text: “哦，现在都直呼我的大名了？胆子不小嘛。”{n}她丰满的双唇绽开一个讥讽的笑容。{/n}“我倒是有点好奇。就算你说得对，那又怎样？你不过是空口无凭，我可不觉得塞贝里安会相信你。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: “哦，现在都直呼我的大名了？胆子不小嘛。”{n}她丰满的双唇绽开一个讥讽的笑容。{/n}“我倒是有点好奇。就算你说得对，那又怎样？你不过是空口无凭，我可不觉得塞贝里安会相信你。”

languages.text: « Vous vous adressez à moi par mon prénom maintenant ? Voilà qui est bien familier. » {n}Ses lèvres charnues s'étirent en un rictus sardonique.{/n} « Vous m'intriguez. Quand bien même vous auriez raison... quelle importance ? C'est votre parole contre la mienne, et je doute fort que Seberian vous croie. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: « Vous vous adressez à moi par mon prénom maintenant ? Voilà qui est bien familier. » {n}Ses lèvres charnues s'étirent en un rictus sardonique.{/n} « Vous m'intriguez. Quand bien même vous auriez raison... quelle importance ? C'est votre parole contre la mienne, et je doute fort que Seberian vous croie. »

languages.text: "Bana artık ismimle mi hitap ediyorsunuz? Çok cesurca." {n}Dolgun dudakları, alaycı bir gülümsemeyle yayılıyor.{/n} "İlgimi çektin. Diyelim ki haklısınız. Ne olmuş? Sözünüze karşı benim sözüm. Seberian'ın size inanacağından şüpheliyim."
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: "Bana artık ismimle mi hitap ediyorsunuz? Çok cesurca." {n}Dolgun dudakları, alaycı bir gülümsemeyle yayılıyor.{/n} "İlgimi çektin. Diyelim ki haklısınız. Ne olmuş? Sözünüze karşı benim sözüm. Seberian'ın size inanacağından şüpheliyim."

languages.text: "Oh, sind wir schon bei Vornamen? Sehr gewagt." {n}Sie verzieht ihre vollen Lippen zu einem süffisanten Lächeln.{/n} "Faszinierend. Nehmen wir an, Ihr habt recht ... und? Dann steht Euer Wort gegen meines, und ich bezweifle, dass Seberian Euch glauben wird."
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, sind wir schon bei Vornamen? Sehr gewagt." {n}Sie verzieht ihre vollen Lippen zu einem süffisanten Lächeln."Faszinierend. Nehmen wir an, Ihr habt recht ... und? Dann steht Euer Wort gegen meines, und ich bezweifle, dass Seberian Euch glauben wird."

languages.text: 「ああ、ファーストネームで呼ぶようになったのね。大胆ね。」{n}、彼女のふっくらとした唇は皮肉な笑みに歪んだ。{/n}「興味深いわ。あなたが正しいと仮定するとしても、どうすればいいの？ あなたの言葉と私の言葉、どちらを信じるかは、セベリアンが判断するわ。あなたを信じると思う？」
languages.original_text: "Oh, are we on first name terms now? Very bold." {n}Her plump lips spread into a sardonic grin.{/n} "I'm intrigued. Let's say you're right — and what of it? It is your word against mine, and I doubt Seberian will believe you."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、ファーストネームで呼ぶようになったのね。大胆ね。」{n}、彼女のふっくらとした唇は皮肉な笑みに歪んだ。{/n}「興味深いわ。あなたが正しいと仮定するとしても、どうすればいいの？ あなたの言葉と私の言葉、どちらを信じるかは、セベリアンが判断するわ。あなたを信じると思う？」
